personal.name: Pratik Kumar
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & UI/UX Designer
personal.bio: I'm a passionate full-stack developer and designer, currently pursuing my engineering degree while building innovative digital solutions. My journey began with a curiosity about how things work, which led me to explore the fascinating world of technology and design. Through self-learning and hands-on projects, I've developed expertise in web development, AI/ML integration, and UI/UX design.

projects.title: World of Cell
projects.description: An interactive educational platform exploring human cell biology with AI-powered chatbot, comprehensive cell information, research references, and interactive timelines. Features include cell comparison, search functionality, and PWA support.

projects.title: Zero Waste Lifestyle
projects.description: A comprehensive sustainability platform with AI-powered waste classification using Google Gemini Vision, LLaMA 3 chatbot, interactive recycling map, gamification system with badges, quiz engine, impact calculator, and real-time analytics dashboard. Built with Next.js and Supabase.

projects.title: EMS - Environmental Monitoring System
projects.description: IoT-based real-time environmental monitoring system using ESP8266 microcontroller with DHT11 temperature/humidity sensor and gas sensor. Features include WiFi connectivity, Flask REST API backend, Streamlit dashboard with interactive charts, LCD display, cloud data storage, and real-time analytics. Monitors air quality, temperature, and humidity with automatic data logging.

projects.title: BiomechAI
projects.description: Advanced biomechanics analysis platform combining ESP32 sensor data collection with AI-powered posture and gait analysis. Features real-time biomechanical assessment using MediaPipe pose detection, MPU6050 IMU sensor integration, Google Gemini AI chatbot for personalized recommendations, interactive dashboard with live data visualization, and comprehensive biomechanical reports. Enables real-time posture monitoring and gait pattern analysis.

projects.title: Travelian India
projects.description: AI-powered travel planning platform with multi-agent system using Google Gemini. Features intelligent itinerary generation, budget planning with multiple tiers, interactive maps with OpenStreetMap integration, real-time travel recommendations, and comprehensive travel planning. Built with React 19 and FastAPI backend, includes LangChain orchestration, MongoDB geo-based recommendations, and GSAP animations. Developed for Samsung PRISM GenAI Hackathon 2025.

projects.title: FloatChat - AI-Powered ARGO Ocean Data Analysis
projects.description: Intelligent conversational system for exploring and analyzing ARGO float oceanographic data using natural language queries. Features RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) for natural language to SQL translation, interactive Streamlit dashboard with geospatial visualization, FastAPI RESTful backend, and trained LSTM/CNN models for ocean data prediction. Processes 6,514 NetCDF files with 6,178 ARGO float profiles covering temperature, salinity, pressure, and depth data across Indian, Southern, and Pacific Oceans. Optimized for 16GB M4 MacBook with memory-efficient chunked processing.

projects.title: DocuMind - RAG-Powered Document Q&A
projects.description: Intelligent document question-answering system using Retrieval-Augmented Generation. Upload PDFs or text, ask questions in natural language, and get accurate answers with source citations. Built with LangChain, vector embeddings, and OpenAI for semantic search and generation.

projects.title: SentimentScope - Social Media Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: ML-powered sentiment analysis dashboard for social media and review data. Uses fine-tuned transformer models for classification, real-time streaming analysis, and interactive visualizations. Supports multiple languages and custom model training pipelines.

projects.title: Swastify
projects.description: A comprehensive healthcare app designed to provide seamless medical services, appointment booking, health tracking, and patient management. Features intuitive UI/UX design with focus on accessibility and user experience for both patients and healthcare providers.

projects.title: PrepMate
projects.description: An exam study companion app designed to help students prepare effectively. Features study planning, progress tracking, mock tests, and personalized learning recommendations. Clean and modern UI focused on reducing study anxiety and improving productivity.

projects.title: Moodify
projects.description: A mood-based music recommendation app that suggests songs and playlists based on user's current emotional state. Features intuitive mood selection, personalized playlists, and seamless music discovery experience with beautiful, emotion-driven UI design.

projects.title: CaSScade 2025
projects.description: Website design for CaSScade 2025, a technical chapter event at college. Features modern, engaging design with event information, registration system, schedule, and interactive elements. Designed to create excitement and encourage participation.

projects.title: Antex
projects.description: Industry-grade antenna design and optimization platform combining analytical EM models, FDTD simulations, and AI-powered optimization (Genetic Algorithms and Particle Swarm Optimization). Features multiple antenna shapes, RF analysis with Smith Chart and VSWR, 2D geometry visualization, convergence plots, and PDF report generation with AI recommendations. Live on Vercel.

projects.title: Chakra - 3D Educational Visualization
projects.description: Interactive 3D educational website that visualizes the seven chakras on a human anatomy model with detailed anatomical correlations. Built with React Three Fiber and Three.js. Features smooth camera animations, glassmorphism UI, toggle controls for chakra markers and anatomical layers, and comprehensive educational content for each chakra.

projects.title: Antenna Parameter Calculator
projects.description: Web-based microstrip patch antenna calculator built with React and TypeScript. Enables quick design calculations for antenna dimensions and parameters. Clean, responsive UI deployed on Vercel for engineers and students.

projects.title: MED-Estation
projects.description: Medical station platform with backend API, database layer, and Docker deployment. Python-based backend for healthcare data and workflows.

projects.title: HF Digital Twin Platform (Human-Digital-Twinning)
projects.description: Hospital-grade digital twin platform for heart failure patients. Combines data-driven ML, mechanistic physiology models (e.g. Windkessel), and clinical workflows for personalized medication recommendations, outcome predictions, treatment comparison, and longitudinal patient modeling. Features document OCR, prescription and lab parsing, RxNorm medication database, and production-ready FastAPI backend with React frontend.

projects.title: Antenna Digital Twin
projects.description: Digital twin platform for microstrip patch antennas with ML surrogate models, real-time prediction, uncertainty quantification, and closed-loop learning from measurements. Integrates Meep FDTD and OpenEMS, Gaussian Process and Neural Network ensembles, optimization engine, and React + TypeScript frontend. Trained on 1000+ Meep FDTD samples.

projects.title: Veda-AI
projects.description: Veda AI is a "Cosmic Guidance Portal"—a fully decoupled, futuristic web application that acts as an interactive digital ashram. It houses a massive, highly structured sacred text library containing the Bhagavad Gita and other texts, integrated with a conversational guidance engine.

projects.title: Astraeus
projects.description: A high-performance aerospace trajectory calculation and flight physics simulation environment, enabling real-time telemetry logging, path modeling, and thrust calculations.

projects.title: Demeure AI
projects.description: A smart real estate recommendation and virtual property assistant, built for WebForge 2026. Features include AI-assisted property evaluation, visual search matchers, and predictive spatial market valuation grids.

projects.title: XAI - Trust Lab
projects.description: Explainable AI (XAI) intrusion detection framework, executing a composite trust scoring system for fair, transparent, and uncertainty-aware threat assessment in networked systems.

projects.title: upLIFT
projects.description: HackWise 2.0 is a premium AI-driven platform designed to de-risk startup ideas for founders and investors by leveraging large language models and historical startup datasets for business validation.

projects.title: Munyongo
projects.description: A premium redesigned version of the Munyongo platform, rebuilt as a frontend learning exercise with advanced modular animations and fluid layout architecture.

projects.title: CaSScade2.O
projects.description: "DIVS GONE WILD" - A futuristic hackathon event landing page where creativity meets code, featuring futuristic animations, registrations, schedule grids, and neon themes.

experience.description: Founded MMEW3, leading a team of 6 other design-engineers to architect and deliver custom web apps, brand systems, and high-conversion SEO structures.

Design user interfaces and experiences for web and mobile applications. Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs. Conduct user research and usability testing. Collaborate with development teams to ensure design implementation.

Lead design initiatives and mentor members in the Design domain. Organize design workshops, competitions, and events. Create user interfaces and experiences for society projects and events. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality design solutions.
